ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
title: Valid name and phone update succeeds
classification_rationale: This test validates the successful update of mandatory fields.
preconditions: User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
steps: Enter 'John Doe' in the Name field.
Enter '+1-555-0100' in the Phone field.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Customer profile is updated successfully. HTTP 200 is returned.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage

ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.

expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Name is required.

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Happy path: ST1-AC2 completed successfully via UI with valid data
classification_rationale: Validates the successful update of a customer profile with a unique email.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists with email: unique@example.com.
steps: Open the customer profile for Customer ID: CUST-10045.
Enter New Email: new_unique@example.com.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Customer profile is updated with New Email: new_unique@example.com.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Unauthorized request for ST1-AC2 is rejected at API level
classification_rationale: Validates that unauthorized requests are rejected by the API.

expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body indicates unauthorized access.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Unauthorized user attempts to update customer profile
classification_rationale: This test checks that unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.

Include updated name and phone in the request body

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Unauthenticated user attempts to update customer profile
classification_rationale: This test verifies that unauthenticated users cannot update customer profiles.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
No user is logged in.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045
Include updated name and phone in the request body
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error: Authentication required.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Expired token user attempts to update customer profile
classification_rationale: This test checks that users with expired tokens cannot update customer profiles.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has expired token.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045
Include updated name and phone in the request body
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error: Token expired.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: User attempts to update another user's profile
classification_rationale: This test verifies that users cannot update profiles they do not own.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has permission to edit profiles.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10046 exists and is owned by another user.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10046
Include updated name and phone in the request body
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error: Forbidden access.

ac_text: Audit history must capture previous and new values.

Save the changes.
